SourceName: 3form Material Solutions, Inc. - Ecoresin Panels Plant(Site ID: 14197)
GeneralDescription: 3form Material Solutions, Inc. (3form) operates two (2) paint booths; one (1) paint mix room; several cutting machines, such as laser machines, saws, shapers, polishers, and planers; and several small natural gas-fired heaters. Project_Description: 3form has requested an administrative amendment to AO DAQE-AN141970006-20, dated April 30, 2020, to remove the Powder Coating Booth (II.A.8) and associated conditions and to clarify the use of the Paint Booths (II.A.2). The source never installed a separate Powder Coating Booth as listed in the equipment list. Instead, all powder coating operations have been processed in the Paint Booths.

GeneralDescription: ACS Manufacturing Inc. (ACS) has requested an AO for a new emergency system manufacturing facility in Clearfield, Davis County. The facility will produce acoustic equipment, enclosures, fuel tanks, turbine systems, and skids. Raw metal is brought to the facility where it is cut, bent, and painted.
Source_Classification: Located in Northern Wasatch Front O3 NAA, Salt Lake City UT PM2.5 NAA Davis County Airs Source Size: B
Project_Description: ACS has requested an AO for a new emergency system manufacturing facility in Clearfield, Davis County. The facility has one (1) paint booth that will primarily emit VOCs and HAPs. The facility includes an abrasive blasting room that is controlled by a full room dust collection system and vented internally.

SourceName: AMPAC, Utah Operations- Production Facility(Site ID: 12910)
GeneralDescription: American Pacific Corporation (AMPAC) operates a chemical plant located near Cedar City. The present plant has two (2) 900 Hp boilers that provide steam for the plant operations. These boilers provide an excess of steam than is required for the current production rate. AMPAC has request approval to replace each 900 Hp boiler with two (2) 400 Hp boilers. This would allow them to ramp up the boilers to provide steam as needed for their plant operations. The larger boilers provide more steam than is needed which also generates a higher emission rate than would be generated from the smaller boilers.
